# New England Recipe Photo Slots

These images support the New England regional cuisine launch. Each recipe card uses a dish-specific photo. Do not assign unrelated food photos or generic regional collages to these recipe records.

## Style

- Editorial food photography with warm natural light.
- Food should be the clear subject before the title is read.
- No watermarks, text overlays, AI-looking hands/faces, or unrelated props.
- Crop should work at 4:3 and 16:9 for cards and hero areas.
- Recommended source size: 1600px wide or larger.

The app only marks these New England recipes as photo-ready when the matching filename exists and is included in `newEnglandPhotoReadyRecipeIds`.
